ogTitle: Bankstown Aerodrome vs Bannister: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bankstown Aerodrome and Bannister.
heading: Bankstown Aerodrome vs Bannister — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bankstown Aerodrome, New South Wales and Bannister, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bannister has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bankstown Aerodrome (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bankstown Aerodrome or Bannister safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bankstown Aerodrome has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Bannister scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bankstown Aerodrome scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Bannister scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bankstown Aerodrome or Bannister?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bannister has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
